name: rocky-local
description: Local marketplace serving the rocky Claude Code plugin straight from this dev repo (directory source, read in place — no façade).

plugins.name: rocky
plugins.description: 7 openapi_* tools (cache-first OpenAPI / Swagger spec inspection, endpoint search, tag list) + seo_validate + notion_* (ntn CLI-gated) + journal_* (append-only local journal). Slash commands: /finish, /pr-watch, /curate.
